title: Permission Decision Event
description: Emitted when the permission engine evaluates an action and produces a tier decision.

session_id.description: Unique identifier for the current session.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this specific action evaluation.

profile_id.description: ID of the risk profile that matched, or 'dynamic' if classified at runtime.

classifier_id.description: ID of the classifier rule used, if dynamic classification was applied.

tool.description: Abstract tool category (shell, file-edit, file-write, file-read, web-fetch).

command.description: The command or path being evaluated, redacted of secrets.

outcome.description: What actually happened after the tier was determined.

composite_score.description: Weighted composite risk score used in tier calculation.

trust_score.description: Project trust score at the time of decision.

override_applied.description: Whether a profile override changed the computed tier.

side_effects_triggered.description: Side effects triggered by this action (e.g., quality-gate, account-switch).

latency_ms.description: Time in milliseconds to compute the permission decision.

project.description: Project name from the trust ledger.
